howItWorks.intro: This spice substitution calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Substitute Amount
rules.formula: Substitute Qty = Original Qty x Conversion Ratio
rules.explanation: Each spice pair has a specific ratio based on relative potency and flavor intensity.

rules.name: Fresh to Dried
rules.explanation: Standard conversion: 1 tablespoon fresh herb equals 1 teaspoon dried.

howItWorks.outro: Cooking times and measurements can vary by equipment and altitude. Adjust based on your specific setup.

faq.question: What is the fresh to dried herb ratio?
faq.answer: The general rule is 1 tablespoon fresh = 1 teaspoon dried (3:1 ratio). Dried herbs are more concentrated because water has been removed. Add dried herbs early in cooking and fresh herbs at the end.

faq.question: Can I use garlic powder instead of fresh garlic?
faq.answer: Yes. Use 1/3 teaspoon garlic powder per clove of fresh garlic. Powder works best in dry rubs, marinades, and sauces. Fresh garlic is better when you want the texture and sharper flavor, like in garlic bread or stir-fry.

faq.question: Is the Spice Substitution Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard cooking and food preparation formulas trusted by home cooks and chefs. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What spice you need should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate spice you need value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Spice Substitution Calculator?
sections.body: The Spice Substitution Calculator is a free online tool designed for home cooks and chefs who need quick, accurate calculations in the cooking and food preparation space. By entering your spice you need, amount needed, you get instant results including best substitute, amount to use, second option. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting best substitute right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cooking and food preparation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by home cooks and chefs worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to perfect your recipes with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your spice you need and need to find the right best substitute. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.description: Type or select your amount needed in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your best substitute, amount to use, second option. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.
